Nawab Bibi, widow of Karam ud٠Din After the death of their predecessor, they were benefited from such land as share holders since I9SU und after the death of thetr motner Scanned with CamScanner Slon .#C!0A J& ٥L Shegtقشgسآ IN THE LAHORE HIGH COURT MULTAN BENCH MULTAN ععسعشه اaعiسا CR.No S6l DZUUI Abdullah, EIc VEI3U5 Safia Bibi, etc JUDGMENT Date of hcaring فاخا 6ا Petitioners uy: Mn Mudassar Saghن Chaملس Advocae Respondents by: Ms Kaffaat Hussain Khan Daha Aشفcae Abdul Reمعشا Khanl L1کkaشL ٧0cHI٤ش٥ ٨٩ز Rara L uqman Ali طhمف Advocate ظطلک ھھکسطھنقا Through this revisi0n petition, the petitioners (defendants) have called in qucstion judgment 8nd decret dated 24.7.2007 passed by Additional District Judge Khanewal whereby the appeal filed by respondents (plaintiffs) allowed and by setting aside judgment and decree dated 19.12,2000 passed by the Civil Judge Jahanian District Khanewal the suit for dcclaration filed by the respondents, was decreed facts of the caSc ure that respondents sisters (Mst Safia Bihi, etc ) instituted ازلا5 legal heirs of Karam ud Din who was ٧٢ ٢١ ٦٧ property measuring 2Jlkanals 1O marlas situated in Chak NoHZ/IO-R and T6-kanals 12marlas in Chak NoI4ZIO-R Tehsil Jahanian, District Khanewal and contended that the plaintiffs being Iegal hcirs are entitled share the property left by their predeccssor- in-interest along with their mother Mst Nawab Bibi, widow of Karam ud٠Din After the death of their predecessor, they were benefited from such land as share holders since I9SU und after the death of thetr motner Scanned with CamScanner Slon Fricr ل2م لکھللھے Mst Nawab Bibi, petitioners brothers assured the respondents that their property inherited as legaE heirs has Irunsferred in thuir names in the revenut ٧٠0٧٥ and also kept on paying the share of produce respondents, ٥٧٤ which respondents did not bother revenue uflicer officials for verificution ofrevenue rccord, however the year 1992 when petitioners refused hand ovEF share of produce respondents then ٨٨٩٧١٢, found that the said property had been got transferred in the name petitioners through verbal Tumieeq No,1 dated 2712.1963_ verbal Tumleeq No16B dated 27.121963 and ٢٨٦١؟٨٧٦ N٥.17 dated 6.3.1967 w٤ll as mutation No17 dated 8.3,1967. The said Tamieeq and Mutations ٤٥٤ challenged by the plaintiffs respondents through suit for declaration claiming relief on ground that the transfer of disputed land by way of Tamleeq and MuLIIUns product of misrepresentation 8nd ٢Tذ ineffective upon their rights and prayed that the same be set aside The SuII Was contested Dy Ine petitioners who supported the mutations and transfer of property in their favour The said suit was dismissed by the [n78| ٤٥١٨ VI٥e Juogmenl and decree lated 19.12.2000, The respondents filed an appeal the said judgment and decrec which allowed by the appellate court vide judgment and decree dated 24.72UD7 and the court decrced the suit filed by the respondents prayed for by setting aside the impugned mutations |he peutioners n3٧٤ called qucsti0n afore refered judgment and decree dated 24, 2UU7 passed by appellate court through the titled revision petition Scanned with CamScanner becil against

Fricr ل2م لکھللھے Mst Nawab Bibi, petitioners brothers assured the respondents that their property inherited as legaE heirs has Irunsferred in thuir names in the revenut ٧٠0٧٥ and also kept on paying the share of produce respondents, ٥٧٤ which respondents did not bother revenue uflicer officials for verificution ofrevenue rccord, however the year 1992 when petitioners refused hand ovEF share of produce respondents then ٨٨٩٧١٢, found that the said property had been got transferred in the name petitioners through verbal Tumieeq No,1 dated 2712.1963_ verbal Tumleeq No16B dated 27.121963 and in their favour The said suit was dismissed by the [n78| ٤٥١٨ VI٥e Juogmenl and decree lated 19.12.2000, The respondents filed an appeal the said judgment and decrec which allowed by the appellate court vide judgment and decree dated 24.72UD7 and the court decrced the suit filed by the respondents prayed for by setting aside the impugned mutations |he peutioners n3٧٤ called qucsti0n afore refered judgment and decree dated 24, 2UU7 passed by appellate court through the titled revision petition Scanned with CamScanner becil against It has been argued bchalf of the petitioners that the gift favour uf the petitioners and transfer pruperty vide afore referred mutations of gift and sale werc und Ihe same could IUI have been set aside It is also argucd that the respondents failed establish their case by leading evidencc 5٧٥٥٥٨ their cuntention that Ihe mutations were bogus Besides, respondent No 3 Sughran Bibi ٩٨٤٢٨٨١ ٦؟ had admited thar the plaint does not bcar her signature, henee her extent the suit was liable be dismissed It is also that the respondents had reccived cunsideration amount for transfeming tne sult property ano wcrc now precluded fur challenging the و٧ ٦ During the pendeney ufithe titled civil revision, respondents No،I (Safia Bihi) نnd ( Sughra Bibi) appcared in the Cour 02.06.2015 and in the presence of their leamed counsel stated that they do not have any objection ifthe revisiun petition acccpted, From the order passed by this court on U2.06.2015, is clear that respundents No1 ( Safia Bibi) and ( Sughra Bibi) have conceded the claim of the petitioners and only the respondent No2 ( Zakia Bibi) is contesting the same The leamed counsel for respondent No 2 has argucd that Karam ud Din, father ofthe purties, was owner of the suit property and on his death the property transfered in the name of three respondents and their mother Mst Nawab Bibi vide mutation of inheritance ExP-1 Subsequently, the mother of the parties also died The petitioners In order to deprive the respondents sisters from inheritance transfened the property of their mother directly to their names vide Mutation Ex P٠2 subsequently got the property of the respondents transfened their Scanned with CamScanner genuine arg ue ٥ ٧
